get.description: Get paginated list of addresses. Can filter by customer_id to get customer-specific addresses, or return all company addresses if not provided.

parameters.description: Customer ID to filter addresses by customer (optional - if not provided, returns all company addresses)
parameters.name: customer_id

post.description: Create a new address. Can be associated with a specific customer (optional) or created as a company-level address.

parameters.description: Create driver with user login access
parameters.name: has_login

put.description: Update driver data. If driver has associated user (user_id != NULL), name and phone will be synced to user automatically.

delete.description: Soft delete driver. If driver has associated user (user_id != NULL), user will also be soft deleted (cascade).
